_comment: Pile Waypoints config - edit this file to customize supply pile positions.
_howToUse: This file is valid JSON. Do not use // or /* */ comments. Use keys like _comment or _guide if you want to leave notes.
After editing this file, save it and run /iq reload. You do NOT need to restart the game.
Each object inside 'piles' is one pile waypoint shown during Kuudra supplies.
noPreValue controls which pile gets the special no-pre color for each missing pre count. Use 0 if the pile should never be highlighted as the no-pre pile.

pileFields.name: Displayed pile name.
pileFields.noPreValue: Optional integer used by the no-pre highlight system.
